title: EXPLAIN fails on queries with extensive NULLIF usage while execution succeeds
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE v4 ( v6 VARCHAR(255), v7 BOOLEAN, v8 FLOAT );
INSERT INTO v4 VALUES ('test', TRUE, 1.5), (NULL, FALSE, 2.5), ('example', NULL, 3.0);
SELECT nullif(v8, 2.5) AS nullified_value FROM v4 WHERE v7 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT v6, nullif(v7, TRUE) AS nullified_boolean FROM v4 WHERE v6 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v4 WHERE v7 = TRUE) AS true_count, nullif(NULL, NULL) AS null_check;
key_bug_features: EXPLAIN fails with extensive NULLIF usage in queries
